{{Infobox group
| name = Brightcrown
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Brightcrown]] healers are [[sacred artists]] who attempt to conserve [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Each member of the [[Brightcrown]] family has a floating golden crown over their heads.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Brightcrowns control organized medicine.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Brightcrowns can possess the [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
